summary: Frontend regression test after wrapping reaper img + lantern glow in shared skew-sway wrapper. All flows verified: home load, reaper-bg + reaper-lantern render, lantern positioned over lantern (right side), tabs Food/Drinks/Bars/Desserts click through, ZIP 10001 -> Deal Your Fate -> result card with bold+xl italic reaper-line. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Lantern glow relative position measured at x=0.907, y=0.263 (spec target ~0.86, ~0.27). Visually the glow is correctly overlapping the lantern in the screenshot, but x is slightly further right than the spec target (~5% delta). Not a blocker - visual placement looks correct.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 passed clean. Shared skew-sway wrapper does not cause regressions. reaper-line computed styles: fontWeight=700, fontSize=20px, fontStyle=italic. All 4 tabs clickable. Spin flow renders result card with 'Destiny points here.' reaper-line. No console errors on load or after spin.
